name: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values through its culture, policies, and day-to-day behavior of personnel.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No new hires during review period — onboarding controls untested. Ensure next audit period includes documented new hire onboarding tickets.

name: Board Oversight of Internal Control
description: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of the development and performance of internal controls.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No exceptions noted.

name: Organizational Structure, Authority, and Responsibility
description: Management establishes structures, reporting lines, authorities, and responsibilities in pursuit of objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Org chart inspected and verified.

name: Commitment to Attract, Develop, and Retain Competent Individuals
description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent individuals in alignment with organizational objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No new hires during review period — job descriptions reviewed but hiring process untested. Document next hire fully.

name: Accountability for Internal Control Responsibilities
description: The entity holds individuals accountable for their internal control responsibilities in pursuit of objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Performance reviews inspected and verified. Must complete annual reviews within next audit window.

name: Obtains or Generates Quality Information
description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal controls.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Logging/monitoring config and security calendar both verified.

name: Internal Communication of Information
description: The entity internally communicates information, including objectives and responsibilities for internal control, necessary to support the functioning of internal controls.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No new hires during review period — policy sign-off and security training onboarding untested. Quarterly training records verified.

name: Communication with External Parties
description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting the functioning of internal controls.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Subscription agreement and change communication process verified. No emergency changes occurred during review period.

name: Specifies Suitable Objectives
description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to those objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Quarterly internal control review and management operations review both documented and verified.

name: Identifies and Analyzes Risk
description: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives across the entity and analyzes risks as a basis for determining how risks should be managed.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Risk assessment and system inventory both inspected and verified.

name: Assesses Fraud Risk
description: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks to the achievement of objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Fraud risk considered as part of annual risk review — documented.

name: Identifies and Assesses Changes
description: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal controls.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Risk assessment accounts for changes year-over-year and is formally documented.

name: Ongoing and Separate Evaluations
description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether the components of internal controls are present and functioning.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Capacity monitoring dashboards and continuous security monitoring both verified.

name: Evaluates and Communicates Deficiencies
description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner to parties responsible for corrective action.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Development roadmap communications and quarterly self-evaluations both verified.

name: Selects and Develops Control Activities
description: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to the achievement of objectives to acceptable levels.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Risk assessment process and engineering control activities verified.

name: Selects and Develops General Controls Over Technology
description: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Risk owners develop technology control activities from annual risk assessment.

name: Deploys Control Activities Through Policies and Procedures
description: The entity deploys control activities through policies that establish what is expected and procedures that put policies into action.
notes: AUDIT FLAG. Governance policy review was conducted March 6, 2024 — BEFORE the audit period began May 20, 2024. Must schedule this year's review to fall inside the audit window.

name: Logical Access Security Software and Architecture
description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets to protect them from security events.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. CIS report for standard build procedures and password/SSH key configs both verified.

name: New Internal and External User Registration and Authorization
description: Prior to issuing system credentials, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No new hires or terminations during review period — access provisioning and revocation controls untested. Must document all future changes with tickets.

name: Removes Access When No Longer Required
description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles, responsibilities, or the system design and changes.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Annual access role review inspected and verified.

name: Physical Access Controls
description: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected information assets to authorized personnel.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Marked Not Applicable — RRS uses AWS (subservice organization) for physical infrastructure.

name: Logical Access to Protected Information Assets
description: The entity discontinues logical and physical protections over physical assets only after the ability to read or recover data and software from those assets has been diminished.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No media/device disposals during review period — Data Retention Policy inspected and verified.

name: Controls Against Malicious Software
description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Firewall rulesets (deny-all external), TLS on web servers both verified.

name: Restricts Transmission of Confidential Information
description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. TLS, VPN, and SFTP encryption verified for data in transit.

name: Manages Changes to Hardware and Software
description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software to meet the entity's objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Windows Defender RMM centrally managed and monitored — verified.

name: Vulnerability and Patch Management
description: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations that result in the introduction of new vulnerabilities, and to susceptibilities to newly discovered vulnerabilities.
notes: AUDIT FLAG. Penetration test (Apr 22–May 2, 2024) was conducted BEFORE the audit period started. Monthly vulnerability scans verified. Must schedule next pen test to fall inside the audit window.

name: Monitors System Components for Anomalous Behavior
description: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors affecting the entity's ability to meet its objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Change detection mechanism and incident reporting verified.

name: Evaluates Security Events
description: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure of the entity to meet its objectives and, if so, takes actions to prevent or address such failures.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Incident postmortem process verified.

name: Responds to Identified Security Incidents
description: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program to understand, contain, remediate, and communicate security incidents.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Incident Response Policy inspected and verified.

name: Incident Recovery and Learn from Security Events
description: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Information System Contingency Plan inspected and verified.

name: Authorizes, Designs, Develops, Acquires, Implements, and Maintains Infrastructure Changes
description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures to meet its objectives.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. No system changes during review period — change management process untested but policies verified. Must log all future changes in ticket system with management approval.

name: Risk Mitigation for Business Disruptions
description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. Written BCP and DR plan inspected and verified.

name: Vendor and Business Partner Risk Management
description: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners, including the risk that those parties may not perform in accordance with the entity's commitments and system requirements.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. AWS SOC 2 report reviewed; vendor management process and signed contracts verified.

name: Identifies and Maintains Confidential Information
description: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. MFA for external users, TLS, data retention policy, clean desk, data classification, password policy, network diagram, 2FA for sensitive systems, test data usage, customer data segregation, role-based access — all verified.

name: Disposes of Confidential Information
description: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.
notes: AUDIT PASSED. 30-day data deletion on contract termination, hardware disposal procedures, paper disposal procedures, secured storage bin, and termination checklist — all verified. No terminations during review period so termination checklist was untested.
